name: Sesame Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the stock to a low boil.
2. Beat sesame paste with water and lemon juice in a bowl.
3. Add a cup of hot stock to the mixture and stir together.
4. Remove from heat and pour into the prepared serving dish.
5. Garnish with herb and serve with bread.
Jack Santa Maria, "Greek Vegetarian Cookery"
